slides.title: Extending Classes
Inheritance Example
slides.codeSnippet:
<?php
class Vehicle {
    public $brand;
    public function start() {
        echo "Engine started.";
    }
}
class Car extends Vehicle {
    public $doors;
    public function honk() {
        echo "Beep beep!";
    }
}
$myCar = new Car();
$myCar->brand = 'Toyota';
$myCar->doors = 4;
$myCar->start();
$myCar->honk();
?>

slides.title: Overriding Methods

quizData.question: What keyword is used to inherit a class?
quizData.explanation: extends is used for class inheritance.
